records.question: Which suppliers provide products priced at least 971.44?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN products ON product_suppliers.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE products.product_price >= 971.44
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Suppliers.supplier_id
FROM Suppliers
JOIN Product_Suppliers ON Suppliers.supplier_id = Product_Suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN Products ON Product_Suppliers.product_id = Products.product_id
WHERE Products.product_price >= 971.44
GROUP BY Suppliers.supplier_id

records.question: What suppliers named Tesco have the phone number 287-071-1153x254, with addresses effective on or after 2008-11-22 12:01:25 and valid at least until 2018-03-02 19:50:22, and who supplied products from at most 2017-07-13 15:02:24 to exactly 2018-03-24 23:01:03 with total amounts purchased exactly 31862.59 and total value purchased at least 76992.42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE supplier_addresses.date_from >= '2008-11-22 12:01:25' AND supplier_addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-02 19:50:22' AND suppliers.supplier_phone = '287-071-1153x254' AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND suppliers.supplier_name = 'Tesco' AND product_suppliers.total_value_purchased >= 76992.42 AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_from <= '2017-07-13 15:02:24'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.supplier_id
FROM Suppliers s
JOIN Supplier_Addresses sa ON s.supplier_id = sa.supplier_id
JOIN Addresses a ON sa.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN Product_Suppliers ps ON s.supplier_id = ps.supplier_id
WHERE s.supplier_name = 'Tesco'
  AND s.supplier_phone = '287-071-1153x254'
  AND sa.date_from >= '2008-11-22 12:01:25'
  AND (sa.date_to IS NULL OR sa.date_to >= '2018-03-02 19:50:22')
  AND ps.date_supplied_from <= '2017-07-13 15:02:24'
  AND ps.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03'
  AND ps.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59'
  AND ps.total_value_purchased >= 76992.42

records.question: Which suppliers provided Hardware mice priced at least 803.74, with a total purchase amount exactly 31862.59, supplied from exactly 2017-07-13 15:02:24 to exactly 2018-03-24 23:01:03?

SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN products ON product_suppliers.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE product_suppliers.date_supplied_from = '2017-07-13 15:02:24' AND product_suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03' AND product_suppliers.total_amount_purchased = '31862.59' AND products.product_type_code = 'Hardware' AND products.product_name = 'mouse' AND products.product_price >= 803.74
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Suppliers.supplier_id
FROM Suppliers
JOIN Product_Suppliers ON Suppliers.supplier_id = Product_Suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN Products ON Product_Suppliers.product_id = Products.product_id
WHERE Products.product_name = 'Hardware mice'
  AND Products.product_price >= 803.74
  AND Product_Suppliers.total_value_purchased = 31862.59
  AND Product_Suppliers.date_supplied_from = '2017-07-13 15:02:24'
  AND Product_Suppliers.date_supplied_to = '2018-03-24 23:01:03'

records.question: Which suppliers have purchased products valued at least 7273.74 and have associated addresses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT suppliers.supplier_id FROM suppliers
JOIN supplier_addresses ON suppliers.supplier_id = supplier_addresses.supplier_id
JOIN product_suppliers ON suppliers.supplier_id = product_suppliers.supplier_id
WHERE product_suppliers.total_value_purchased >= 7273.74
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Suppliers.supplier_id
FROM Suppliers
JOIN Product_Suppliers ON Suppliers.supplier_id = Product_Suppliers.supplier_id
JOIN Supplier_Addresses ON Suppliers.supplier_id = Supplier_Addresses.supplier_id
WHERE Product_Suppliers.total_value_purchased >= 7273.74
GROUP BY Suppliers.supplier_id
